author: PromptPort
description: Curated presets for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, MiniMax, FLUX, Nano Banana, MAI 2, Meta AI, and GPT Image 2

presets.name: FLUX — Cinematic Portrait
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: woman in flowing crimson coat] [Environment: foggy stone bridge at golden hour] [Action: turning to look over her shoulder] [Camera: 85mm f/1.4, shallow depth of field] [Lighting: warm backlight through mist, rim lighting on hair] [Style: cinematic, film grain, anamorphic lens flare] [Mood: melancholic, mysterious] [Exclude: modern buildings, crowds, cars]

presets.name: FLUX — Cyberpunk Alley
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: cyberpunk hacker in reflective chrome jacket] [Environment: rain-soaked Tokyo alley at night] [Action: typing on holographic keyboard] [Camera: Sony A7IV 35mm f/1.4] [Lighting: cyan and magenta neon signs, wet asphalt reflections] [Style: Blade Runner aesthetic, cinematic] [Mood: tense, atmospheric] [Exclude: cars, crowds, modern signage]

presets.name: FLUX — Product Hero Shot
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: matte black wireless earbuds on white marble slab] [Camera: macro 100mm f/2.8, top-down angle] [Lighting: 3-point studio setup, softbox key, gradient background] [Style: commercial product photography, clean minimal] [Mood: premium, sophisticated] [Exclude: fingerprints, dust, harsh shadows]

presets.name: Gemini Nano — Infographic Poster
presets.basePrompt: [Text: "CLIMATE ACTION 2026" in bold sans-serif, "Reduce. Reuse. Regenerate." subtitle] [Subject: Earth with green energy rings] [Environment: dark space background with data visualization elements] [Style: modern infographic, flat design, teal and coral palette] [Exclude: clutter, small unreadable text, photorealistic humans]

presets.name: Gemini Nano — Concept Art
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: floating crystal city above storm clouds] [Environment: twilight sky, aurora borealis] [Style: Syd Mead meets Studio Ghibli, color script: deep purple #4B0082 vs electric gold #FFD700] [Mood: wonder, scale, ethereal] [Camera: wide establishing shot] [Exclude: humans, vehicles, modern architecture]

presets.name: MAI 2 — Commercial Fashion
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: androgynous model in oversized structured wool coat with exaggerated shoulders] [Environment: minimalist concrete gallery space] [Action: mid-stride, coat billowing] [Lighting: single overhead spotlight, dramatic shadow] [Style: runway editorial, FW26 couture, raw silk lining visible] [Camera: medium format, 80mm equivalent] [Exclude: jewelry, patterns, bright colors]

presets.name: MAI 2 — Architectural Render
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: cantilevered concrete pavilion overlooking ocean] [Environment: coastal cliff, golden hour, native grasses] [Style: Tadao Ando minimalism, material palette: board-formed concrete, glass, weathered steel] [Lighting: warm west-facing sun, long shadows] [Camera: drone elevation, wide angle] [Exclude: people, vehicles, vegetation inside structure]

presets.name: Meta AI — Social Media Post
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: vibrant smoothie bowl with fresh fruit] [Environment: bright marble kitchen counter] [Style: Instagram food photography, high saturation, top-down angle] [Text: "Morning Fuel" in playful script font] [Mood: fresh, healthy, energetic] [Exclude: clutter, dirty dishes, artificial lighting]

presets.name: Meta AI — Pet Portrait
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: golden retriever puppy] [Environment: sunny garden with dappled light] [Action: sitting attentively, tongue out] [Style: warm portrait photography, soft focus background] [Mood: joyful, wholesome] [Exclude: leash, collar, humans]

presets.name: GPT Image 2 — UI Mockup
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: mobile banking app dashboard] [Environment: clean white background with subtle gradient] [Text: "Balance: $12,450" in Inter Bold, "Recent Transactions" section header] [Style: flat UI design, iOS guidelines, rounded corners, soft shadows] [Constraints: No real bank logos, no sensitive data, clean spacing 8px grid] [Use case: App store screenshot]

presets.name: GPT Image 2 — Book Cover
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: silhouette of lone astronaut on red Martian dune] [Environment: twin moons in dusty orange sky] [Text: "RED DUST" in bold condensed sans-serif top center, "A Mars Chronicle" in light serif below] [Style: sci-fi book cover, cinematic composition, high contrast] [Constraints: No NASA logos, readable at thumbnail size, 2:3 aspect ratio] [Use case: E-book cover]

presets.name: Ideogram — Logo Design
presets.basePrompt: [Text: "NEXUS" in bold geometric sans-serif, all caps, tracking wide] [Subject: abstract interlocking hexagon mark] [Style: minimalist tech logo, single color navy blue on white, vector clean lines] [Exclude: gradients, shadows, photorealistic elements, small details]

presets.name: Ideogram — Event Poster
presets.basePrompt: [Text: "SUMMER FEST 2026" in bold retro font top, "July 15-17 - Central Park" in clean sans-serif below] [Subject: abstract sunburst with music notes] [Style: retro-modern poster, warm orange and cream palette, bold typography] [Exclude: small text, cluttered layout, photorealistic people]

presets.name: SD 3.5 — Fantasy Character
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: elven archer with crystalline bow] [Environment: bioluminescent forest] [Style: fantasy concept art, highly detailed, dramatic lighting] [Camera: medium shot, eye level] [Mood: heroic, mystical] [Exclude: modern elements, humans, technology]

presets.name: SD 3.5 — Anime Style
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: schoolgirl with twin tails and oversized headphones] [Environment: Tokyo street at dusk, cherry blossoms] [Style: anime, vibrant colors, cel shading] [Camera: portrait, slight low angle] [Mood: energetic, youthful] [Exclude: realistic proportions, western cartoon style]

presets.name: ChatGPT — Code Review Prompt
presets.basePrompt: Review the following Python function for edge cases, security vulnerabilities, and performance issues. Provide specific line-by-line feedback and suggest improvements. [Constraints: Check for SQL injection, race conditions, memory leaks. Suggest unit tests.]

presets.name: ChatGPT — Creative Writing
presets.basePrompt: Write a short story opening (300 words) about a lighthouse keeper who discovers a message in a bottle from the future. Use sensory detail and establish the character's voice. [Style: Literary fiction, atmospheric, slow-burn tension] [Constraints: No dialogue in the opening. Focus on environment and internal monologue.]

presets.name: Claude — Legal Contract Analysis
presets.basePrompt: Analyze the following software license agreement. Identify: 1) Defined terms and their scope, 2) Limitation of liability clauses, 3) Termination conditions, 4) Jurisdiction and governing law, 5) Any ambiguous language that could favor either party. [Constraints: Flag any unlimited liability, auto-renewal traps, or IP assignment clauses.]

presets.name: Claude — Research Synthesis
presets.basePrompt: Synthesize the following three research papers on transformer architecture improvements. For each: summarize methodology, grade evidence quality (Strong/Moderate/Weak), identify limitations, and note conflicts between findings. [Constraints: Distinguish correlation from causation. Note sample sizes and replication status.]

presets.name: Gemini Flash — Socratic Tutor
presets.basePrompt: Help me understand why neural networks need activation functions. Use the Socratic method: ask me leading questions, check my misconceptions, and guide me to the answer without telling me directly. [Constraints: Never give the mathematical formula upfront. Start with intuition.]

presets.name: Gemini Flash — Executive Summary
presets.basePrompt: Summarize the following quarterly report into an executive briefing. Structure: 1) TL;DR (1 sentence), 2) Key metrics with YoY comparison, 3) Stakeholder impact by department, 4) Top 3 risks, 5) Recommended actions with owners. [Constraints: No hedging language. Quantify everything possible. Flag any red flags immediately.]

presets.name: Kimi — Long Document Analysis
presets.basePrompt: Analyze this 200-page technical whitepaper on quantum computing applications in drug discovery. Extract: 1) Key hypotheses and their evidence, 2) Methodology critique, 3) Comparison with competing approaches, 4) Gaps in current research, 5) Future directions with highest potential. [Constraints: Note confidence levels. Flag speculative claims.]

presets.name: Kimi — Bilingual Content
presets.basePrompt: Write a bilingual (English/Chinese) product description for a smart home device. The English version should be concise and technical. The Chinese version should be warm and lifestyle-focused. Maintain brand voice consistency across both. [Constraints: Technical specs must match exactly. Cultural adaptation is encouraged.]

presets.name: GLM — Structured Data Extraction
presets.basePrompt: Extract all named entities, dates, monetary values, and relationships from the following business news article. Output as structured JSON with confidence scores. [Constraints: Handle ambiguous references. Flag uncertain extractions. Support both English and Chinese text.]

presets.name: GLM — Academic Paper Outline
presets.basePrompt: Create a detailed outline for a research paper on large language model alignment. Include: abstract structure, literature review themes, methodology section, expected results, and discussion points. [Constraints: Follow APA formatting. Cite seminal works. Address ethical considerations.]

presets.name: MiniMax — Creative Dialogue
presets.basePrompt: Write a dramatic dialogue between a time traveler from 2147 and a historian from 2026. The traveler reveals a shocking truth about a major historical event. Build tension through subtext and pauses. [Style: Theater script format, minimal stage directions] [Constraints: No exposition dumps. Show emotion through dialogue beats.]

presets.name: MiniMax — Marketing Copy
presets.basePrompt: Write persuasive marketing copy for a sustainable water bottle brand. Target: environmentally conscious millennials. Tone: aspirational but grounded. Include: headline, 3 bullet points, call-to-action. [Constraints: No greenwashing claims. Back every claim with specific data points.]
